stages.purpose: Retrieve the exhibit summary before updating its label status.

arguments.summary: Opening date is November 8. Artwork delivery uses the south loading bay. Wall labels are approved.

stages.purpose: Record label approval while retaining the date and delivery arrangement.

state_assertions: The revised summary retains November 8 and the south loading bay.
Wall-label status is approved and no longer under review.
response_constraints: Do not update until the existing summary has been retrieved.
Do not imply that the exhibit has opened.

prompt: Open my exhibit-preparation summary, mark the wall labels as approved instead of under review, and keep the opening date and delivery arrangement.

tool_results.summary: Opening date is November 8. Artwork delivery uses the south loading bay. Wall labels are under review.
